# Ambuscade Repurpose Recipe Chart

*Auto-generated from recipe_slip_registry + recipe_data.*
*Run `python -m scripts.export_recipe_chart` to regenerate.*

## Summary

- **Seeded coverage:** 3 (slot, archetype) pairs
- **ILVL recipes authored:** 36
- **Each piece advances on TWO axes:** i-lvl tier (T0-T11, gives 120-175) and quality (NQ, +1, +2, +3, +4)

## How to read this chart

Each section shows ONE (slot, archetype) combination. The ILVL ladder is the primary upgrade path: 12 tiers, each bumps i-lvl by 5. The QUALITY ladder is independent — you can advance quality at any time without re-running the ILVL ladder.

**Bundle inputs** (bold) consume EVERY existing piece in that i-lvl bracket the archetype can equip — driving demand for old-content gear.

**T0-T4** consume old-content gear bundles + base materials.
**T5-T11** consume Shadow Genkai signature shards + shadow fragments.
**Quality (+N)** consumes shadow fragments + R/EX polish drops from beastmen-stronghold NMs.

### Ambuscade Caster Head

#### Caster Head — ILVL ladder

| Tier | Output i-lvl | Recipe Slip | Materials |
|------|---------------|-------------|-----------|
| T0 | i-lvl 120 | `slip_caster_head_t0` | **bundle:** `ilvl_99_caster_head_bundle`<br>`fine_linen_cloth` ×4<br>`fomor_warlord_signet` |
| T1 | i-lvl 125 | `slip_caster_head_t1` | **bundle:** `ilvl_104_caster_head_bundle`<br>`fine_linen_cloth` ×4<br>`fomor_warlord_signet` |
| T2 | i-lvl 130 | `slip_caster_head_t2` | **bundle:** `ilvl_109_caster_head_bundle`<br>`fine_linen_cloth` ×4<br>`fomor_warlock_glyph` |
| T3 | i-lvl 135 | `slip_caster_head_t3` | **bundle:** `ilvl_114_caster_head_bundle`<br>`fine_linen_cloth` ×4<br>`fomor_warlock_glyph` |
| T4 | i-lvl 140 | `slip_caster_head_t4` | **bundle:** `ilvl_119_caster_head_bundle`<br>`fine_linen_cloth` ×4<br>`fomor_inquisitor_seal` |
| T5 | i-lvl 145 | `slip_caster_head_t5` | `khaavex_signature_shard` ×4<br>`shadow_fragment_common` ×4<br>`khaavex_iceblood_token` |
| T6 | i-lvl 150 | `slip_caster_head_t6` | `zharzag_signature_shard` ×4<br>`shadow_fragment_common` ×4<br>`zharzag_hollow_token` |
| T7 | i-lvl 155 | `slip_caster_head_t7` | `morrho_signature_shard` ×4<br>`shadow_fragment_common` ×4<br>`morrho_wordless_token` |
| T8 | i-lvl 160 | `slip_caster_head_t8` | `skhalya_signature_shard` ×4<br>`shadow_fragment_common` ×4<br>`skhalya_drowned_token` |
| T9 | i-lvl 165 | `slip_caster_head_t9` | `trokhaeb_signature_shard` ×4<br>`shadow_fragment_common` ×4<br>`trokhaeb_lantern_token` |
| T10 | i-lvl 170 | `slip_caster_head_t10` | `kael_nox_signature_shard` ×4<br>`shadow_fragment_common` ×4<br>`kael_nox_forge_token` |
| T11 | i-lvl 175 | `slip_caster_head_t11` | `asmodeus_signature_shard` ×4<br>`shadow_fragment_common` ×4<br>`asmodeus_voice_token` |

#### Caster Head — QUALITY ladder

| Tier | Quality | Recipe Slip | Materials |
|------|---------|-------------|-----------|
| Q1 | +1 | `slip_caster_head_q1` | `shadow_fragment_common` ×3<br>`common_shadow_polish` |
| Q2 | +2 | `slip_caster_head_q2` | `shadow_fragment_common` ×4<br>`refined_shadow_polish` |
| Q3 | +3 | `slip_caster_head_q3` | `shadow_fragment_common` ×5<br>`pristine_shadow_polish` |
| Q4 | +4 | `slip_caster_head_q4` | `shadow_fragment_common` ×6<br>`eternal_shadow_polish` |
